channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Pro-Trans Activists Demonstrate Intimidation Tactics
item.description: A series of concerning incidents at Oxford University.

item.title: Newsweek Criticizes UFC Women's Patriotic Costumes After Defending Flag Burning
item.description: The outlet's stance on flag etiquette contrasts with its previous coverage of flag desecration.

item.title: Former Obama Official Laments Success of Social Security Scare Tactics
item.description: Democrats used fearmongering on entitlement reform for years. The consequences are now apparent.

item.title: Pete Buttigieg Backs Democrats' Court-Packing Plan
item.description: Another prominent Democrat supports the party's controversial proposal to expand the Supreme Court.
